testimonials.quote: Shadcn Space replaced messy UI kits and half-baked templates. Today our dashboards look premium, scale beautifully, and our team focuses on real features instead of design debt.
testimonials.author: Walter Dutcher

pricing_plans.plan_description: For companies who need design support. One request at a time
2x the speed. Great for an MVP, Web App or complex problem
Launch your website faster with ready-to-use components, blocks and zero setup friction with us.
Scale with confidence using premium blocks, templates, and included strategy guidance.
Build at scale with full access, priority support, and dedicated one-on-one strategy calls.

plan_features_pro.feature_text: Access to all core Shadcn UI blocks

faq_items.question: What services does Shadcn Space offer?
faq_items.answer: We offer a wide range of services including web development, app development, and digital marketing.

faq_items.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq_items.answer: The time it takes to complete a project depends on the complexity of the project and the scope of the work.

faq_items.question: How is pricing structured at Awake Agency?
faq_items.answer: Pricing is based on the complexity of the project and the scope of the work.

faq_items.question: Do you offer ongoing support after project completion?
faq_items.answer: Absolutely! We offer comprehensive post-launch support to ensure a seamless implementation and provide ongoing maintenance packages tailored to clients who need regular updates or technical assistance. Our commitment doesn't end at launch — we're here to help you every step of the way.

faq_items.question: How often will I receive updates on my project?
faq_items.answer: We provide updates on a regular basis to ensure that your project is running smoothly and that you are aware of any changes or updates to the project.
